since_last: 39% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.05% · BTC -0.92% · Gold +0.58% · Nasdaq100 +0.47%. 39% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.05%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.05%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -15.42%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +10.39%, SPCX +7.95%, AMAT +7.09%, LRCX +5.51%, TER +5.39%. Laggards: SNAP -15.42%, SMR -5.50%, OKLO -5.40%, OKLO -5.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +7.95% at $207.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +7.95% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
